footnotes.text: Sanctify myself: by offering Himself as a victim to be immolated. That they also may be sanctified: i.e., be set aside for God's work. In truth: i.e., "in contrast to all human purpose"; or for that truth which is to be the object of their mission, as it is of Christ's.
Glory: What Christ conferred upon His disciples was something of the divine nature, a further aspect of the principle of unity.
